name: conventional-commits
description: Skills for drafting, validating, splitting, and executing Conventional Commits.

interface.longDescription: Reusable skills for applying Conventional Commits policy, drafting commit messages, splitting changes, and running a minimal commit workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use $conventional-commits:draft-message to draft a Conventional Commit message for my changes.
Use $conventional-commits:commit to commit the current work using Conventional Commits.
Use $conventional-commits:writing-conventional-commits to split my current changes into logical Conventional Commits.
Commit the current work using Conventional Commits.
